name: Caramel Corn
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the margarine, brown sugar, and corn syrup in a large saucepan over medium heat. Stir frequently until boiling.
2. Boil for 5 minutes without stirring to prevent burning. Carefully add baking soda and vanilla extract, then stir well.
3. Pour the mixture evenly over popped corn and mix gently to coat.
4. Transfer the coated popcorn to a greased roasting pan. Bake at 250°F (125°C) for 1 hour, stirring occasionally with a spatula and checking every 15 minutes to ensure even cooking.
5. Allow the caramel corn to cool completely before storing in an airtight container.
